value.stringValue: Auto Create DR Items & Active Personnels PB Flow

actionCalls.name: myRule_3_A1
actionCalls.label: Launch Auto Create DR Items & Active Personnels PB Flow

value.stringValue: Update Daily Report on HSEQ Form Flow

actionCalls.name: myRule_5_A1
actionCalls.label: Update Daily Report on HSEQ Form Flow

rules.name: myRule_1
rules.label: Daily site job is first created or report date changed

rules.name: myRule_11
rules.label: DSJS Rig Manager is Blank and Type Is Rig

rules.name: myRule_18
rules.label: (Rig) Is Site Job Summary Present on Submit

rules.name: myRule_3
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7)
rules.label: If Site,Unit NOT NULL & Type Rig or Camp

rules.name: myRule_25
rules.label: Daily Site Job Summary is changed

rules.name: myRule_7
rules.label: Manager is blank and Unit is populated

rules.name: myRule_9
rules.label: Ops Sup is blank and Contract is Populated

rules.name: myRule_3_pmetrule
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND (6 OR 7)
rules.label: Previously Met - Prev

Flow.description: Consolidated Daily Site Job automations - will be the sole one moving forward
Flow.label: Daily Site Job Automations

recordUpdates.name: myRule_11_A1
recordUpdates.label: Update Daily Site Job Summary Rig Manager

recordUpdates.name: myRule_16_A1
recordUpdates.label: Update Camp LTI on Daily Site Job Summary
